title: We Audited crewAI's AI Dependencies: Here's What the Data Says
subtitle: 47 dependencies, 8 scored against 220K repos, and what a strategic fitness audit reveals that GitHub stars can't — including the gaps in our own data.
author: Graham Rowe
meta_description: Strategic dependency audit of crewAI's 47 dependencies. 6 of 7 scored deps are #1 in their category. mem0 is the weak link. LiteLLM has 2,399 commits/month. Plus: what we can't yet score and why.
